completed_tasks.name: Fix central admin auth in tests
Fix stale test assertions and cascade teardown

decisions.decision: Route to verifyViaCloudflare when CF enabled, even without hostname ID
decisions.rationale: Domains predating CF linkage need hostname creation on checkStatus

decisions.decision: Wrap Mockery::close() in try-finally before parent::tearDown()
decisions.rationale: Mockery exceptions prevented RefreshDatabase rollback, cascading 20+ failures

decisions.decision: Use TenantModuleRegistry instead of JSON blob attributes in E2E tests
decisions.rationale: Phase 3 moved to module_installations table; old attributes no longer read

next_action: All architecture audit issues resolved (CRITICAL, MAJOR, MODERATE, MINOR). Next milestone: INFRA (Docker hardening, nginx security headers, OPcache, scheduler).
context_notes: Milestone v1.0 (Security Hardening) is complete. All 3 critical issues fixed: C1 central admin auth, C2 module ZIP upload security, C3 module state persistence. All MAJOR issues fixed: MAJOR-01 host verification consolidated, MAJOR-02 EnsureModuleInstalled identity-map fixed, MAJOR-03 CreateTenantAction wrapped in DB::transaction, MAJOR-04 Tenant model has relationships/accessors/scopes, MAJOR-05 repair migration is idempotent. All MODERATE issues fixed: N+1 trap eliminated, domains:recover-stuck command, ModuleController catches specific exceptions, config() instead of env(), domain actions extracted. All MINOR issues cleaned up. 96 tests passing (233 assertions). Only INFRA remains.
